{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Jai clan mounts
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]]'s mounts are bats the size of horses with gray-white fur.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
